Our philosophy
We believe dentistry should feel human first.
The teeth come second.

Most people don’t fear the dentist. They fear feeling rushed, unseen, and unsure of what’s happening to them. So we built our practice around the opposite of all that — conversation before treatment, clarity before consent, and a pace that lets you settle.

01

Slower appointments

We schedule fewer patients a day so yours never feels like a queue.

02

Radical transparency

You’ll see your scans, understand every option, and know the cost upfront.

03

Comfort as standard

Warm blankets, noise-cancelling headphones, and a hand to raise anytime.

The studio

A space designed to lower your shoulders the moment you walk in.

Linen, oak, soft stone, and plants that are actually alive. Less waiting room, more living room — because how a place feels changes how care feels.

Meet the doctor

“I’d rather you leave feeling heard than rushed. Good dentistry is mostly listening — the rest is just steady hands and patience.”

M
Dr. Maren Ellis, DDSFounder · Restorative & Cosmetic Dentistry

Trained at UCSF and practicing in California for fourteen years, Dr. Ellis built Lumen after years of feeling that dentistry had forgotten the person in the chair. She sees a handful of patients a day, by choice.

Quiet transformations

Results that look like you — just well-rested.

Drag to see the difference. No blinding white, no fake perfection. Just natural, believable change.

Before After
↔
How we can help

Care, explained gently — one option at a time.

01Veneers
02Invisalign
03Whitening
04Implants
05General Dentistry

Veneers

Hand-shaped, tooth by tooth, for a result that still looks like you.

Invisalign

Clear, removable, and planned digitally so you see the finish before we start.

Whitening

Brighter, never harsh — calibrated to a shade that suits your face.

Implants

Permanent, comfortable, and placed with guided precision and care.

General Dentistry

Cleanings and check-ups that feel like maintenance, not interrogation.

If you’re nervous

Nervous is welcome here.
Truly.

No judgment, ever

However long it’s been, whatever the state of things — we’ve seen it, and we’re glad you came.

Stop anytime

Raise your hand and everything pauses. You’re always in control of the pace.

Calm & sedation options

From simple breathing techniques to gentle sedation — whatever lets you exhale.

The journey

Four calm steps. No surprises along the way.

01

Consultation

We talk first. About your history, your worries, and what you actually want — before anything else.

~45 minutes
02

Digital Planning

3D scans and clear visuals so you can see the plan and the outcome before you decide.

Same week
03

Gentle Treatment

Unhurried, comfort-led appointments. We check in often and never push past your pace.

At your speed
04

Long-Term Care

Friendly reminders and steady upkeep so the work we did together quietly lasts.

Ongoing
Patient stories

How it felt, in their words.

★★★★★

I hadn’t been to a dentist in nine years out of pure fear. I left actually calm — and booked the next visit myself.

Sophie R.Los Angeles
★★★★★

Nobody made me feel guilty. They just explained everything and let me breathe. It changed how I think about all of this.

Daniel M.San Diego
★★★★★

My veneers look like teeth, not like a billboard. Friends keep saying I look rested, and that’s exactly it.

Priya N.San Francisco
★★★★★

It feels more like a small hotel than a clinic. I was bracing myself and instead I just… relaxed.

Marcus T.Santa Monica
Questions

Everything you might be wondering, answered honestly.

Still unsure about something? A consultation is the easiest way to talk it through — no commitment.

More than okay — it’s most of who we see. Tell us at booking and we’ll build in extra time, go at your pace, and stop the moment you need to.

Mostly conversation. We listen to your history and goals, take a gentle look and a scan if you’re comfortable, then talk through options. No treatment happens that day unless you want it to.

You’ll get a clear, itemized estimate before anything begins — no surprises later. We offer payment plans and will always tell you if a simpler option would do.

We work with most major PPO plans and will check your coverage and explain your benefits in plain language before you decide anything.

Comfort comes first. We use gentle numbing, modern techniques, and sedation options when helpful. You can raise your hand to pause at any moment.

When you’re ready

Begin with a conversation.

No pressure, no commitment — just a calm first step. We’ll listen, you’ll learn, and you decide what happens next.

Book a Consultation → Or call us
